bullets: Designed and maintained production-grade Airflow DAGs and Python/SQL ELT orchestration workflows to schedule batch pipelines and warehouse model updates, processing millions of records daily with automated data quality alerting and retry logic.
Contributed to cloud data platform architecture leveraging AWS S3 data lake storage, Snowflake warehousing, and CI/CD pipeline automation to power product analytics and executive dashboards.

Built and scaled production-grade distributed data processing pipelines using Apache Spark and AWS EKS, managing multi-terabyte workloads across 5+ years of data engineering to ensure horizontally scalable reliability for warehouse analytics.
Designed data quality frameworks and automated validation checks using dbt tests, enabling root-cause analysis and observability through alerting and documentation.
Partnered with technical and non-technical stakeholders—product, finance, and engineering teams—to translate ambiguous requirements into trusted datasets and self-service analytics products.

Spearheaded design of a Contract Intelligence Platform leveraging Spring Boot, Redis, Kafka, and Hugging Face Transformers, delivering 1,000+ real-time document inferences/day while reducing query latency by 70%.

Devised and productionized a multi-agent RAG architecture (FAISS, Sentence Transformers, LangChain, OpenAI API) achieving 89% top 3 recall, directly elevating bid-win probability and proposal velocity.
Established container-native CI/CD pipelines through GitHub Actions and Jenkins, enabling zero-downtime deployments and proactive telemetry on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters.
Implemented infrastructure-as-code workflows using Terraform and CloudFormation, enabling reproducible data platform deployments with CI/CD automation and dbt model versioning.
Developed high-throughput Node.js microservices backed by PostgreSQL, achieving sub-100ms response times for analytics dashboards consumed by executive leadership.
Mentored junior engineers in data engineering best practices—pipeline design, SQL optimization, and testing—while driving adoption of data quality frameworks and observability standards.
Spearheaded DevOps excellence through Agile, TDD, and performance-tuning sprints, hardening CI/CD pipelines and accelerating feature delivery velocity by 45%.

education.degree: M.S. in Information Systems, Syracuse University, Syracuse, NY
B.E. in Electronics Engineering, Mumbai University, Mumbai, India

projects.name: Predictive System Monitoring with AI
bullets: Developed an AI-driven monitoring platform to predict infrastructure failures by analyzing logs, metrics, and user behavior, leveraging Kafka, Spark, and AWS Kinesis for real-time data processing.
Implemented ML models for anomaly detection and time-series forecasting and built Grafana/Prometheus dashboards to deliver actionable reliability insights.

projects.name: Syracuse Student Marketplace
bullets: Building a peer-to-peer campus marketplace for Syracuse University students to buy, sell, and exchange items using Next.js, Supabase, and Vercel with real-time listings and university email authentication.
Designed row-level security policies in PostgreSQL via Supabase RLS to scope listing visibility and messaging to verified university users.
